title: Sonic Drown Music
description: "Because Drowning Could Be Any More Anxiety Inducing!"
body:
Adds the sonic drowning system aswell as music when you drown,
Enjoy!


-Changes-

Your oxygen bar now instantly regens when resurfacing

You now die instantly when your oxygen bar hits 0

Water breathing potions now treat you as if you are not in water instead of pausing your oxygen bar

The drowning theme from sonic adventure 2 now plays when your oxygen bar is on 7 or less
(Will not play while wearing a helmet enchanted with respiration)
